_comment: Configuration for the waveform ribbon still and 30s test render. JSON does not support real comments, so these _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Remotion components.

_comments.audioSrc: Audio file in public/ or an absolute/URL source. The waveform reacts to this audio.
_comments.frame: Frame used for the static still render. At 30 fps, frame 120 is around 4 seconds into the audio.
_comments.waveform: Visual settings for the ribbon itself.

_comments.width: Ribbon canvas width in pixels for the still image.
_comments.height: Ribbon canvas height in pixels for the still image.
_comments.x: Horizontal position of the ribbon inside the composition.
_comments.y: Vertical position of the ribbon inside the composition.
_comments.colorPairs: Gradient color pairs for each ribbon layer. Each pair moves between the first and second color.
_comments.opacity: Opacity of the visible ribbon shapes. Higher values make colors stronger.
_comments.glowOpacity: Opacity of the blurred glow layer behind the ribbons. Higher values make the ribbon more luminous.
_comments.amplitude: Maximum vertical movement caused by audio volume.
_comments.gain: Audio sensitivity multiplier. Higher values make quieter audio produce larger movement.
_comments.minVolume: Minimum audio volume used for the visual, even during silence. This prevents the ribbon from collapsing completely.
_comments.sampleCount: Number of points used to draw each ribbon path. Higher values can look smoother but render slower.
_comments.smoothFrames: Number of frames before and after the current frame used for audio smoothing. Higher values reduce jitter.
_comments.waveCount: Base number of waves across the ribbon width.
_comments.trebleWaveInfluence: How much high-frequency audio changes wave density. Higher values make speech brightness affect detail more.
_comments.bassThicknessInfluence: How much low-frequency audio changes ribbon thickness.
_comments.rhythmSpeedInfluence: How much rhythmic audio changes animation speed.
_comments.ribbonCount: Number of overlapping translucent ribbon layers.
_comments.thickness: Base thickness of each ribbon layer.
_comments.modeCountMin: Minimum number of local wave clusters per ribbon.
_comments.modeCountMax: Maximum number of local wave clusters per ribbon.
_comments.modeWidth: Width of each local wave cluster. Lower values create tighter, more localized movement.
_comments.centerDrift: How far wave clusters drift horizontally over time.
_comments.modeSpeed: Base speed of the drifting wave clusters.
_comments.gradientPeak: Base position of the strongest second color in each ribbon gradient. 50 means center.
_comments.gradientSpread: How much the gradient peak varies between ribbon layers.
_comments.gradientAngleVariance: How much gradient direction varies between ribbon layers.
_comments.gradientHardness: Sharpness of the color transition. Higher values create punchier color bands.
